name: Navegador Dev Container
postCreateCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt && pip install bandit safety semgrep && curl -sSfL https://github.com/gitleaks/gitleaks/releases/download/v8.22.1/gitleaks_8.22.1_linux_x64.tar.gz | sudo tar -xzf - -C /usr/local/bin gitleaks && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && .devcontainer/fetch-data.sh

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: API key for testing your agent (NOT for Claude Code)

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key for embeddings and analysis (required for ChromaDB population)
